cards.front: What are the three main types of retrieval models?

cards.back: An alternative model of information retrieval that uses a combination of linguistic and statistical techniques to rank documents

cards.front: What is the role of Fuzzy model in Information Retrieval?
cards.back: To model the ambiguity and uncertainty in natural language queries and documents

cards.front: What is LSTM model used for in Information Retrieval?
cards.back: To learn the long-term dependencies in document sequences and improve the ranking of documents
